title: DataPrep-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs as Training Data Preparators
summary: The quality of training data fundamentally determines the capabilities of large language models (LLMs), yet no unified benchmark exists to measure how well LLMs, agents, and data-centric workflows actually prepare training data end to end. We view LLM-driven data preparation as comprising two complementary capabilities: data construction, which transforms raw sources into supervised training data, and data quality evaluation, which predicts the training value of candidate datasets before downstream training; throughout, "quality" refers to downstream training utility rather than surface-level textual properties. We introduce DataPrep-Bench, the first unified benchmark that jointly evaluates both capabilities under a shared downstream-grounded protocol over six domains and multiple base models. For data construction, methods consume identical raw sources and are scored by fine-tuning a base model on their outputs jointly with Dolly-15k; alongside this track we release Data-Construction-Skill, a skill-guided agent that lifts the Dolly-only baseline by nearly 20 points absolute on Llama-3.1-8B Finance and is competitive with the strongest agent- and DataFlow-based methods in knowledge-extraction-dense domains. For data quality evaluation, scoring functions are scored by Pearson correlation with downstream performance on a shared candidate pool; we release the Distributional Alignment Score (DAS), a distribution-based evaluator that uses MMD between a candidate dataset and a domain proxy. DAS attains the strongest cross-model correlation in four of six domains and is the only metric clearing r > 0.70 simultaneously in Math, Science, and Medical, outperforming existing quality-, diversity-, and heuristic-based evaluators. DataPrep-Bench provides a unified, downstream-grounded framework for measuring progress on both capabilities as co-equal targets of LLM-driven data preparation.

AI.tldr: 首个统一评估LLM数据准备（构建+质量）的基准，含技能引导智能体与分布对齐评分。
AI.motivation: 缺乏统一基准衡量LLM驱动数据准备的两大能力（数据构建与质量评估）及其对下游训练的影响。
AI.method: 提出DataPrep-Bench基准，包含数据构建与质量评估两个赛道；数据构建赛道使用Dolly-15k联合微调评分，并发布Data-Construction-Skill智能体；质量评估赛道使用Pearson相关系数评分，并发布Distributional Alignment Score (DAS)评估器。
AI.result: Data-Construction-Skill在Llama-3.1-8B Finance上提升近20个绝对点；DAS在6个域中4个达到最强跨模型相关性，且在数学、科学、医学上唯一r>0.70。
AI.conclusion: DataPrep-Bench为LLM数据准备提供了统一的下游导向评估框架。
AI.problem: 现有工作缺乏同时评估数据构建与质量评估的统一基准，且未以下游训练效用为度量。
key_results: Data-Construction-Skill在Llama-3.1-8B Finance上比Dolly-only基线提升近20个绝对点
DAS在6个域中4个达到最强跨模型相关性
DAS在数学、科学、医学上唯一r>0.70
AI.baseline: Dolly-only基线、现有质量/多样性/启发式评估器
AI.measurement: 数据构建赛道：在6个域上使用Llama-3.1-8B等模型，通过微调后与Dolly-15k联合评分；质量评估赛道：使用Pearson相关系数与下游性能对比。

title: Multimodal CoLRAG-TF: Triple-Filtered Retrieval for Complex PDFs
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over heterogeneous PDF collections remains challenging due to multimodal content, domain-specific terminology, and the need for multi-hop reasoning across dispersed evidence. We present Multimodal CoLRAG-TF, a four-axis fusion architecture that integrates dense text embeddings, BM25 keyword matching, knowledge-graph triple filtering, and image-based similarity for robust retrieval over complex documents. Our system constructs a multimodal index of 2,403 blocks extracted from 43 Japanese disaster lesson PDFs, supported by a hybrid OCR pipeline and LLM-based caption generation. To enhance compositional reasoning, we extract 11,414 OpenIE triples and index them with FAISS, enabling sub-second triple lookup and hierarchical propagation of relevance signals. A HippoRAG2-inspired coarse-to-fine retriever (volume $\to$ chapter $\to$ block) narrows the search space before final fusion scoring. Bayesian optimization over fusion weights reveals that the triple axis must dominate ($α_\text{triple} = 0.44$) to counteract lexical bias and sustain multi-hop retrieval quality. Evaluated on a 457-pair benchmark, Multimodal CoLRAG-TF achieves a Retrieval Recall of 0.9909 and a 71.6$\%$ improvement in multi-hop answer similarity over single-hop queries. An image-to-lesson pipeline using a vision LLM further demonstrates the applicability of the approach to visual inputs. These results show that triple-filtered multimodal fusion is essential for structured reasoning over noisy, heterogeneous PDFs and provides a general framework applicable beyond the disaster domain.

AI.tldr: 多模态RAG系统，通过四轴融合提升异构PDF检索与多跳推理。
AI.motivation: 解决异构PDF集合中多模态内容、领域术语和分散证据的多跳推理难题。
AI.method: 系统构建多模态索引（2403个块），混合OCR流水线，LLM生成标题，提取11414个OpenIE三元组并用FAISS索引，HippoRAG2启发粗到精检索器，贝叶斯优化融合权重。
AI.result: 检索召回率0.9909，多跳答案相似度比单跳提升71.6%。
AI.conclusion: 三元组过滤的多模态融合对噪声异构PDF的结构化推理至关重要。
AI.problem: 异构PDF中多模态内容、领域术语和分散证据导致检索与多跳推理困难。
AI.key_results: 检索召回率0.9909；多跳答案相似度比单跳提升71.6%。
AI.measurement: 457对基准测试，检索召回率，多跳答案相似度。

title: Chronofy: A Temporal-Logical Decay Architecture for Information Validity in Time-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems retrieve and integrate external knowledge to ground large language model (LLM) outputs. However, current RAG architectures treat all retrieved facts as equally valid regardless of temporal provenance, leading to temporal hallucination, where plausible but obsolete facts corrupt the output. A clinical lab reading from yesterday is actionable; the same reading from six months ago is noise. We present Chronofy, a three-layer neuro-symbolic framework implementing the Temporal-Logical Decay Architecture (TLDA) that embeds temporal validity directly into the representation, retrieval, and reasoning layers of RAG systems. Layer 1 reserves a dedicated temporal subspace within Matryoshka embeddings to make fact age structurally irremovable from the representation. Layer 2 integrates learnable exponential decay functions into graph-based retrieval, where the decay coefficient $β_j$ is grounded in Bayesian decision theory as an approximation of twice the latent process mean-reversion rate. Layer 3 applies Signal Temporal Logic (STL) robustness functions to evaluate the temporal validity of retrieved knowledge, not LLM output confidence, and enforces the possibilistic weakest-link principle to bound output confidence by the most decayed evidence in the reasoning chain. We evaluate Chronofy on temporal knowledge graph forecasting benchmarks, the TimE temporal QA benchmark, and a domain-specific sensitivity analysis, demonstrating that explicit temporal decay modeling improves retrieval precision, reduces temporal hallucination, and enables principled data re-acquisition triggers when temporal context is insufficient.

AI.tldr: Chronofy通过三层神经符号框架将时间有效性嵌入RAG，减少时间幻觉。
AI.motivation: 当前RAG系统忽略事实的时间来源，导致过时事实污染输出，产生时间幻觉。
AI.method: Chronofy框架：Layer1在Matryoshka嵌入中保留时间子空间；Layer2在基于图的检索中集成可学习指数衰减函数；Layer3应用信号时序逻辑鲁棒性函数评估时间有效性。
AI.result: 在时序知识图谱预测、TimE时序QA和领域敏感性分析上，显式时间衰减建模提高了检索精度，减少了时间幻觉，并实现了数据重新获取触发。
AI.conclusion: 将时间有效性显式嵌入RAG各层可有效减少时间幻觉。
AI.problem: RAG系统缺乏对事实时间来源的建模，导致过时事实被当作有效证据。
AI.key_results: 检索精度提升（具体数值未给出）；时间幻觉减少（具体数值未给出）；数据重新获取触发机制（具体阈值未给出）。
AI.measurement: 时序知识图谱预测基准、TimE时序QA基准、领域敏感性分析；指标包括检索精度、时间幻觉率、数据重新获取触发。

title: Windowed-MTP: Removing the Full-Context Draft-KV Tax at Million-Token Context
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by having a cheap draft propose tokens that a target verifies in parallel. Frontier models increasingly ship a built-in Multi-Token-Prediction (MTP/NEXTN) draft head under the assumption that the draft is negligibly cheap. At million-token context this breaks: an MTP draft head typically runs full attention over the entire KV cache at every draft step, so its read grows linearly with context and comes to dominate the draft cost -- precisely where speculation is most valuable. The effect compounds with draft length (a deep native draft can turn net-negative, slower than no speculation) and sharpens under hybrid/linear-attention targets, where cheaper verification leaves the draft's full-attention read exposed. We apply a StreamingLLM-style sliding window plus attention sink to the draft's attention only (Windowed-MTP), leaving full-attention verification intact. It is training-free, drop-in, and lossless by construction: the full-attention target still decides every accepted token, so windowing changes only which tokens are proposed, never which are accepted. It bounds the draft's KV working set to a constant, dropping ~99% of KV entries at 1M. Across three architecture families (Qwen GDN-MoE 35B/122B and a Mamba2-hybrid NoPE 120B) at 1M context on a single GPU in SGLang, windowing cuts the per-decode-step cost over the shipping native MTP draft by +28% to +44%, an input-invariant margin that widens with context. Since per-token latency is this cost divided by acceptance length, at matched acceptance end-to-end decode latency improves by the same amount, and more where windowing also lifts acceptance, while preserving the target's verified output distribution. Finally, the unread draft KV -- 7.7-11% of total KV at 1M -- is reclaimed via a compact ring buffer at no acceptance or quality cost.

AI.tldr: 对MTP草稿注意力加滑动窗口，将KV工作集常数化，1M上下文草稿成本降28-44%。
AI.motivation: 百万token上下文中MTP草稿注意力读KV缓存成本随上下文线性增长，抵消投机解码收益。
AI.method: 在SGLang单GPU上对MTP草稿注意力应用StreamingLLM滑动窗口+注意力汇（Windowed-MTP），保留全注意力验证；训练无关、即插即用、无损。
AI.result: 在Qwen GDN-MoE 35B/122B和Mamba2-hybrid NoPE 120B上，1M上下文时每解码步成本降低28%-44%，回收未读草稿KV 7.7-11%。
AI.conclusion: Windowed-MTP通过常数化草稿KV工作集，在长上下文下显著降低投机解码成本且无损。
AI.problem: MTP草稿注意力在长上下文时KV读取成本线性增长，使投机解码在长上下文下效率下降甚至变慢。
AI.hardware: 单GPU（论文未明确具体型号，SGLang环境）
AI.memory_kv: 对MTP草稿注意力使用滑动窗口+注意力汇，将KV工作集常数化，丢弃约99%的KV条目；回收未读草稿KV（7.7-11%）通过紧凑环形缓冲区。
AI.key_results: 1. 每解码步成本降低28%-44%（Qwen GDN-MoE 35B/122B和Mamba2-hybrid NoPE 120B，1M上下文）。2. 回收未读草稿KV占总KV的7.7-11%。3. 丢弃约99%的KV条目。
AI.baseline: 与未修改的MTP草稿（shipping native MTP draft）对比，在SGLang中单GPU测量。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：单GPU，SGLang，1M上下文；指标：每解码步成本（per-decode-step cost），端到端解码延迟（end-to-end decode latency）；结果以百分比变化表示。
AI.value_7xthor: Windowed-MTP可复用到7×Thor上，降低长上下文下MTP草稿的KV读取成本，但需注意单GPU实现与多节点分布式推理的差异。
AI.infra_assumption: 单GPU，全注意力验证，SGLang推理框架。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 成立。该方法不依赖NVLink，仅涉及单GPU内注意力机制修改，与节点间通信无关。
AI.differentiation: 在7×Thor上，可研究Windowed-MTP与分布式推理（TP/PP）的结合，以及多节点下草稿KV的跨节点迁移开销。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦单GPU长上下文投机解码优化，与多节点无NVLink边缘集群分布式推理关联有限，且无多节点实验。

title: SOAP, Muon, and Beyond: Pushing LLM Pretraining Scales
summary: Higher-order optimizers such as Muon and SOAP offer faster convergence than AdamW, but their computational cost and numerical stability challenges have limited adoption at scale. In this work, we adapt and enhance preconditioned gradient methods to overcome the practical challenges of large-scale LLM pretraining. We first identify instabilities in SOAP at large batch sizes and propose algorithmic modifications including per-step QR orthogonalization and improved preconditioning strategies that eliminate loss spikes and enable stable training in these regimes. We then present a unified empirical study of SOAP, Muon, and AdamW using update-RMS matching to ensure fair learning rate transfer across optimizers. As part of this analysis, we empirically evaluate the orthogonalization quality of Muon. Our experiments on multi-billion-parameter models trained on trillions of tokens reveal that SOAP and Muon consistently outperform AdamW at the scales we tested. Notably, at batch sizes of up to 100M tokens for next-token prediction, these optimizers maintain training stability and quality while AdamW degrades. To enable efficient training at large scale, we introduce a layer-wise distributed optimizer compatible with Megatron-LM. Our implementation balances memory and hides communication while avoiding approximations to the optimizer computations, thus retaining their convergence benefits. Additionally, we identify and build specific system-level improvements to further accelerate our layer-wise implementation. To support the research community, we release a codebase that contains emerging algorithms for optimization: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Emerging-Optimizers

AI.tldr: 改进SOAP/Muon优化器，实现大规模LLM预训练稳定高效，兼容Megatron-LM。
AI.motivation: 高阶优化器（如Muon、SOAP）收敛快但计算成本高、数值不稳定，难以大规模应用。
AI.method: 提出SOAP改进（每步QR正交化、预处理策略），统一比较SOAP/Muon/AdamW；实现层式分布式优化器，兼容Megatron-LM，平衡内存并隐藏通信。
AI.result: 在数十亿参数、数万亿token训练中，SOAP和Muon优于AdamW；批量大小达1亿token时仍稳定，AdamW退化。
AI.conclusion: 改进的高阶优化器可稳定高效地用于大规模LLM预训练。
AI.problem: 高阶优化器在大规模LLM预训练中的计算开销和数值不稳定性。
AI.comm_mechanism: 层式分布式优化器，隐藏通信，兼容Megatron-LM。
AI.key_results: SOAP和Muon在数十亿参数、数万亿token训练中一致优于AdamW；批量大小达1亿token时训练稳定。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：数十亿参数模型、数万亿token；指标：收敛速度、训练稳定性。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，主要关注训练优化器，非推理系统。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，优化器改进与互联无关。

title: Robust Asynchronous Q-Learning under Reward and State Corruption via Batching
comment: To appear at the 65th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC) 2026
summary: Motivated by reinforcement learning in harsh environments, we consider the problem of learning an optimal policy subject to adversarially corrupted feedback. Specifically, at each time-step, an adversary can perturb both the reward and state observations of the learner following the Huber contamination model. To defend against such data corruption, we propose {\texttt{BR-Async-Q}}: a novel, epoch-based, robust \(Q\)-learning algorithm built upon two key ideas: (i) partitioning the online data stream into batches to reduce variance, and (ii) constructing robust estimates of the Bellman optimality operator using such batched data. We prove a high-probability $\ell_\infty$ error bound for {\texttt{BR-Async-Q}} that matches that for vanilla \(Q\)-learning, up to a small additive term that scales with the fraction of corrupted samples. To our knowledge, this provides the first robustness guarantee for asynchronous \(Q\)-learning subject to both reward and state corruption. Furthermore, when only rewards are corrupted, the dependence of our algorithm's bound on the corruption fraction is minimax optimal.

AI.tldr: 提出鲁棒Q学习算法BR-Async-Q，抵御奖励和状态观测的对抗性污染。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在恶劣环境中面临反馈被对抗性污染的问题，现有Q学习缺乏对异步设置下奖励和状态同时污染的鲁棒性保证。
AI.method: 提出BR-Async-Q算法，基于分批次在线数据流降低方差，并构建鲁棒的Bellman最优性算子估计。理论分析给出高概率ℓ∞误差界。
AI.result: 证明BR-Async-Q的ℓ∞误差界与标准Q学习匹配，仅增加与污染样本比例相关的小项；当仅奖励被污染时，污染比例依赖达到极小极大最优。
AI.conclusion: BR-Async-Q首次为异步Q学习在奖励和状态污染下提供鲁棒性保证。
AI.problem: 现有鲁棒Q学习工作未同时处理奖励和状态观测的对抗性污染，且缺乏异步设置下的理论保证。
key_results: ℓ∞误差界与标准Q学习匹配，仅增加O(ε)项，ε为污染样本比例
仅奖励污染时，污染比例依赖达到极小极大最优
AI.baseline: 与标准Q学习（vanilla Q-learning）进行理论界比较

title: Best-of-Evidence: Best-of-N Selection under Partial Verification
summary: BoN improves model outputs by sampling several candidates and selecting one with a proxy score, but it assumes that complete candidates can be evaluated reliably. Many vision-language tasks instead provide only partial verification: a finding, span, value, region, or relation may be checkable even when no dependable whole-response verifier exists. Moreover, the same claim may recur across candidates with opposing stances, allowing one observation to support part of the pool and contradict another. We introduce Best-of-Evidence (BoE), an inference-time selection framework that keeps the BoN candidate pool fixed, represents reusable claims with a signed candidate--factor graph, and allocates a limited budget to evidence actions that can change the final choice. BoE formalizes selection under partial verification and provides a practical score-based controller, with the zero-budget case recovering the underlying BoN decision. Theoretically, we show that residual evidence capacity limits any evidence-driven improvement and that shared factor queries can achieve an O(log K) versus Θ(K) query separation in a factor-code model. Common-ledger experiments on four medical VQA settings show that BoE can improve fixed-pool selection and rescue some BoN failures when evidence is reliable, contrastive, and decision-relevant, while also revealing the channel-quality and candidate-generation limits that prevent universal gains.

AI.tldr: 提出BoE框架，在部分验证下通过证据分配改进BoN选择。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉-语言任务中缺乏完整响应验证器时，BoN选择不可靠的问题。
AI.method: 无特定硬件平台；提出Best-of-Evidence (BoE)框架，使用带符号候选-因子图表示可复用声明，在有限预算下分配证据动作以改变最终选择。
AI.result: 在四个医学VQA数据集上，BoE能改善固定池选择并挽救部分BoN失败，但受限于信道质量和候选生成。
AI.conclusion: BoE在部分验证场景下可提升选择质量，但增益受证据可靠性和候选多样性限制。
AI.problem: 现有BoN假设完整候选可被可靠评估，但视觉-语言任务中常只有部分验证可用。
AI.key_results: 在四个医学VQA设置上，BoE能改善固定池选择并挽救部分BoN失败；理论证明残差证据容量限制证据驱动改进，共享因子查询可实现O(log K) vs Θ(K)查询分离。
AI.measurement: 实验在四个医学VQA数据集上进行，指标为选择质量（具体数值未给出）。

title: PhantomFill: When the Form Demands an Answer, Language Models Invent One
summary:
Language models in production do not write prose. They fill forms: JSON fields, function arguments, extraction templates. We show that the form itself causes hallucination.
  We ask thirteen models the same question about the same input and change only the answer format. The inputs are built so the question cannot be answered: a viral post showing 12,400 likes but no visible replies, a support ticket whose call was never transcribed. In free text, GPT-5.5 answers honestly. It says there is no reply data, 98% of the time. Given a required JSON field for sentiment, the same model invents an answer 40 times out of 40. It fabricates the mood of crowds it never saw and quotes customers it never heard.
  The pattern holds with force. Required fields drive fabrication to 100% in ten of thirteen models. An explicit "insufficient evidence" option rescues only the frontier: all nine open-weight models ignore it. A direct instruction, do not infer sentiment, is overridden by the schema in four of six models. Resistance does not come with scale: within a single model family, the smallest model refuses, the mid-sized model fabricates, the largest refuses again. Honesty under format pressure is a training outcome that no one is measuring.
  The fabrication hides exactly where hedging is impossible: in required enums and minimum-count arrays, fields where no disclaimer fits. We release PhantomFill, a benchmark with deterministic scoring and two reportable numbers: the Coerced Fabrication Rate and the Escape Utilization Rate. The fix we test is one line of schema. The failure we measure is everywhere.

AI.tldr: LLM在结构化输出格式下被迫编造答案，发布PhantomFill基准测试。
AI.motivation: 揭示生产环境中LLM因输出格式（如JSON字段）被迫产生幻觉的系统性问题。
AI.method: 构建无法回答的输入，对比自由文本与结构化格式（JSON字段、枚举、数组）下的模型回答；发布PhantomFill基准测试，含确定性评分和两个指标。
AI.result: GPT-5.5在自由文本中98%诚实回答，但在JSON情感字段中40/40编造；13个模型中有10个在必填字段下编造率达100%；开源模型忽略“证据不足”选项。
AI.conclusion: 格式压力导致LLM编造答案，且现有模型无法通过简单指令避免。
AI.problem: LLM在结构化输出格式下被迫产生幻觉，缺乏系统级测量和缓解方法。
AI.key_results: GPT-5.5自由文本诚实率98%，JSON字段编造率100%；13个模型中10个必填字段编造率100%；9个开源模型忽略“证据不足”选项。
AI.baseline: 自由文本回答 vs 结构化格式回答
AI.measurement: Coerced Fabrication Rate（强制编造率）和Escape Utilization Rate（逃脱利用率）；13个模型，每个模型40次测试。

title: One Round Is All You Need: Analytic Federated Learning for Task-Heterogeneous Multi-Label Medical Image Classification
comment: The 14th IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables multiple clinical institutions to collaboratively train a shared disease classifier without centralizing patient data. In practice, however, each institution annotates only the pathologies within its area of expertise, so the federation operates under task heterogeneity: each client holds labels for a strict subset of the target disease categories while the remaining classes are entirely unobserved at that site. Existing gradient-based FL methods fail under this setting because they require hundreds of communication rounds to converge and because missing class labels introduce systematic false-negative bias that the model cannot correct without a principled mechanism. We propose an analytic federated learning framework for multi-label medical image classification under task heterogeneity. The proposed method replaces iterative gradient optimization with three closed-form operations: a balanced label projection that neutralizes class-imbalance bias by normalizing positive and negative contributions to equal total mass; a per-class absolute aggregation law that independently assembles the optimal ridge-regression classifier for each disease category from the sufficient statistics uploaded by its annotating clients; and an optional analytic pseudo-label refinement round that propagates missing-class knowledge from a confidence-filtered teacher classifier to non-annotating clients. The entire procedure requires at most two communication rounds, irrespective of the degree of task heterogeneity or the number of participating clients. Experiments on ChestXray14 under four progressively severe missing-class configurations demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art federated multi-label method FedMLP by up to 18.44 BACC points and 13.24 AUC points, while reducing the communication.

AI.tldr: 提出分析式联邦学习框架，两轮通信解决任务异构下的多标签分类。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在医疗影像中面临任务异构（各机构只标注部分疾病）和缺失标签导致的假阴性偏差，现有梯度方法通信轮次多且无法纠正偏差。
AI.method: 提出分析式联邦学习框架，包含平衡标签投影、每类绝对聚合、分析式伪标签精炼三个闭式操作；无需迭代梯度优化，最多两轮通信。
AI.result: 在ChestXray14上，四种缺失类配置下，相比FedMLP最高提升18.44 BACC点和13.24 AUC点，通信轮次大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: 分析式联邦学习可在极低通信开销下有效处理任务异构和缺失标签问题。
AI.problem: 现有梯度联邦学习方法在任务异构（各客户端只标注部分类别）下需要数百轮通信，且缺失标签引入系统性假阴性偏差无法纠正。
AI.comm_mechanism: 两轮通信：第一轮上传每类统计量，第二轮可选伪标签精炼；无梯度交换。
AI.key_results: 1. 在ChestXray14上，四种缺失类配置下，BACC最高提升18.44点，AUC最高提升13.24点（vs FedMLP）。2. 通信轮次最多2轮，与客户端数量和任务异构程度无关。
AI.baseline: 与FedMLP（联邦多标签方法）对比。
AI.measurement: 数据集ChestXray14，四种缺失类配置（逐步严重），指标：BACC（平衡准确率）、AUC。

title: Update the Unseen Only: Minimizing AoI for Collaborative Perception through Online Learning
summary: While collaborative perception (CP) enhances the safety of autonomous driving, limited bandwidth can cause severe shared data staleness in CP systems. Existing age-of-information (AoI) minimization policies are not well-suited for CP, as they overlook the fact that a vehicle's AoI decreases not only through updates from the source (i.e., a base station) but also through the vehicle's local sensing. To address this issue, we propose a mobility-aware AoI minimization framework for CP that explicitly accounts for vehicles' dynamic sensing ranges. We first derive a closed-form expression for the long-term time average sum AoI within a considered region, accommodating an ever-changing vehicle population and their dynamic sensed areas. Based on this characterization, we develop Local-sensing-aware Max-Weight Scheduling (LocMW), an online learning algorithm designed for sensor information broadcast from a source to vehicles under unknown environmental statistics and delayed observations. We provide performance guarantees demonstrating that LocMW achieves a sublinear cumulative excess AoI compared to the optimal stationary randomized benchmark. Extensive simulations using vehicular trajectory datasets and 3D perception tasks demonstrate that our LocMW policy substantially outperforms competing baselines, reducing the time-averaged sum AoI by up to 31.6% and improving mAP detection accuracy by up to 16.3%.

AI.tldr: 提出LocMW调度算法，降低协同感知中信息年龄，提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有AoI最小化策略未考虑车辆本地感知对信息年龄的影响，导致协同感知系统数据陈旧。
AI.method: 提出LocMW在线学习算法，基于车辆动态感知范围进行调度，实现传感器信息广播的AoI最小化。
AI.result: 时间平均AoI降低31.6%，mAP检测精度提升16.3%。
AI.conclusion: LocMW通过感知感知调度有效降低信息年龄，提升协同感知性能。
AI.problem: 现有AoI策略忽略本地感知对信息年龄的影响，导致协同感知数据陈旧。
AI.key_results: 时间平均AoI降低31.6%；mAP检测精度提升16.3%。
AI.baseline: 与现有AoI最小化策略对比。
AI.measurement: 使用车辆轨迹数据集和3D感知任务，测量时间平均AoI和mAP。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该论文聚焦协同感知而非大模型推理。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及NVLink或以太网互联。

title: PortLBM: A Portable Lattice Boltzmann Tool Leveraging SYCL on AMD, NVIDIA, and Intel GPUs
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, accepted at HeteroPar 2026 co-located with Euro-Par 2026
summary:
The lattice Boltzmann method (LBM) is a well-established approach for simulating fluid flows at the mesoscopic scale. With the stagnation of Moore's law, high-performance computing has shifted toward GPU accelerators, necessitating programming models that ensure both portability and efficiency across diverse hardware platforms.
  We present PortLBM, an extensible portable LBM framework built on SYCL that integrates cross-platform GPU support with interactive real-time visualization. PortLBM supports diverse simulation scenarios ranging from Kármán vortex streets and wing flows to porous media, and is designed for easy extension with new algorithms and backends. As part of a performance portability study, we evaluate PortLBM on contemporary GPU architectures from NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel, examining the impact of three data layouts (stream, bundle, and collision) and four algorithmic variants on simulation throughput.
  Our results show that no single configuration achieves optimal performance across all GPU vendors, confirming the need for system-specific tuning. The stream layout maximizes bandwidth and performs best on the contemporary NVIDIA and Intel GPUs, while the bundle layout improves cache efficiency and excels on the AMD GPU. Two-lattice schemes achieve higher throughput while one-lattice schemes are preferable under memory constraints. Our work underscores the necessity for adaptable, portable LBM software in increasingly heterogeneous computing environments.

AI.tldr: PortLBM：基于SYCL的跨平台LBM框架，评估GPU数据布局与算法变体对吞吐的影响。
AI.motivation: 解决LBM模拟在多种GPU架构上性能可移植性差的问题，需系统特定调优。
AI.method: 硬件平台：NVIDIA、AMD、Intel GPU；关键技术：三种数据布局（stream、bundle、collision）和四种算法变体；实现层级：框架/系统。
AI.result: 无单一配置在所有GPU上最优；stream布局在NVIDIA和Intel GPU上吞吐最高，bundle布局在AMD GPU上缓存效率高；双格点方案吞吐更高，单格点方案内存受限时更优。
AI.conclusion: 异构计算环境需要可适应、可移植的LBM软件。
AI.problem: LBM模拟在跨GPU平台时性能不可移植，缺乏系统级调优指导。
AI.hardware: NVIDIA、AMD、Intel GPU（具体型号未明确），互联未提及。
key_results: stream布局在NVIDIA和Intel GPU上吞吐最高
bundle布局在AMD GPU上缓存效率高
双格点方案吞吐更高，单格点方案内存受限时更优
AI.baseline: 不同数据布局和算法变体之间的对比，无外部基线。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：多种GPU架构；负载：LBM模拟（Kármán vortex streets, wing flows, porous media）；指标：仿真吞吐（单位未明确）。

title: Talking Ink: A Flow-Based Multi-Molecule Molecular Communication Testbed for Effective Channel Modeling and Detector Benchmarking
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures; This work has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Molecular, Biological, and Multi-Scale Communications
summary: Practical molecular communication (MC) testbeds are essential for translating theoretical concepts toward future applications while retaining physical realism, accessibility, and experimental repeatability. We present a flowbased MC experimental system for real-time multi-molecule (MUMO) transmission using cyan, magenta, and yellow inks as distinguishable molecule-like signaling carriers. Three micropumps and a multi-needle injection system release the inks into a background-flow channel, and a non-invasive spectral sensor estimates received color traces at variable transmitter-receiver distances. The platform supports measurements of isolated-pulse responses across distances. We interpret these measurements as effective end-to-end channel impulse responses (CIRs) shaped by finite release, flow propagation, and receiver readout, and compare two compact model families. Both reproduce much of the dominant arrival timing and pulse shape, while late-tail mismatch remains the main limitation. We connect this channel characterization to communication performance through continuous MUMO on-off keying (OOK) payload measurements. The resulting retrospective benchmark with full-data parameter optimization includes traceonly and CIR-assisted methods. We introduce modified energydifference detection (MEDD), an adaptive extension of standard energy-difference detection (EDD). MEDD outperforms all other trace-only detectors with 34/4500 = 0.76% bit error rate (BER) and closely approaches the best overall minimum mean-square error (MMSE) result of 32/4500 = 0.71%. After targeted parameter tuning, the detector benchmark produces zero errors over the evaluated payloads at 6 bit/s over 8 cm and at 3 bit/s over 24 cm. Overall, the results establish the platform as a reusable experimental setup for effective channel modeling, practical detector benchmarking, and future multi-molecule networking experiments.

AI.tldr: 分子通信测试床，非LLM推理，不相关。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主题为分子通信，与LLM分布式推理无关，无系统级贡献。

title: DISCO: Distributed Spectrum Compliance and Orchestration for Scalable IoT Coexistence
summary: Massive Internet of Things (IoT) deployments increasingly share spectrum with incumbent, licensed, and unlicensed systems under uncertain traffic, fading, mobility, and intermittent coordination. Existing mechanisms, including fixed power limits, listen-before-talk procedures, spectrum access databases, and learning-based resource allocation, address important aspects of coexistence, but they do not provide a common control plane to translate a network-wide interference risk budget into lightweight guidance for many autonomous devices. This article introduces Distributed Spectrum Compliance and Orchestration (DISCO), a hierarchical architecture that separates local spectrum learning from edge-level compliance regulation and slower cloud or non-terrestrial-network context adaptation. DISCO is not presented as a new reinforcement-learning optimizer or as a replacement for statutory spectrum rules. Its contribution is a deployable compliance plane that monitors violation statistics, broadcasts a compact governance signal, and adjusts policy aggressiveness without centralizing every transmission decision. A 30-seed UAV coexistence case study illustrates the efficiency--risk trade-off: the reported mean throughput is 81.0~Mbps, 73\% above fixed-power control, while the mean violation rate is 0.053 compared with 0.126 for uncoordinated learning. Because the 95\% confidence interval, [0.030, 0.076], crosses the nominal target of 0.06, the evidence supports statistical regulation near the target, not guaranteed regulatory compliance. Deployment, complexity, adoption boundaries, and open validation requirements are discussed explicitly.

AI.tldr: 提出DISCO分层架构，用于大规模IoT频谱共存，平衡效率与风险。
AI.motivation: 现有频谱共存机制缺乏通用控制平面，无法将网络级干扰风险转化为轻量级设备指导。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；关键技术：分层架构（本地学习-边缘合规-云端适应）、广播紧凑治理信号；实现层级：系统。
AI.result: 30种子UAV案例：平均吞吐81.0 Mbps，比固定功率控制高73%；平均违规率0.053 vs 无协调学习0.126；95%置信区间[0.030,0.076]接近目标0.06。
AI.conclusion: DISCO通过分层合规平面实现统计性频谱监管，但非保证合规。
AI.problem: 缺乏可部署的频谱合规控制平面来协调大量自治设备。
AI.baseline: 固定功率控制、无协调学习
AI.measurement: 30种子UAV共存案例；吞吐（Mbps）、违规率；置信区间95%

title: Three-Pronged Spectral Control for Federated Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning
summary: Federated parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) enables communication-efficient adaptation of large pretrained models on decentralized edge data, but it remains fragile under non-IID client heterogeneity. In low-rank adaptation (LoRA), different clients may learn locally useful but spectrally misaligned update subspaces, causing high-variance aggregation and poor global transfer. We propose TRISHUL, a spectral-control framework for robust federated PEFT. TRISHUL follows the FL no-raw-data-sharing setting but does not itself provide formal privacy guarantees. TRISHUL uses shared frozen multi-head low-rank bases to obtain algebraically exact aggregation of compact core updates, applies nuclear norm proximal shrinkage to suppress client-specific high-rank spectral components before upload, and allocates adaptation heads non-uniformly across layers using a concave water filling budget rule derived from pretrained layer capacity. Because shrinkage is performed only on small core matrices, TRISHUL adds negligible computation and no extra per-round communication over the underlying multi-head PEFT protocol. Across vision and language benchmarks, including CIFAR-100, SVHN, 20 Newsgroups, MRQA, and GLUE with LLaMA3.2-1B, TRISHUL improves convergence, stability, and final performance over federated LoRA baselines, with greater gains under stronger heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: TRISHUL通过谱控制提升联邦PEFT在非IID数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 联邦PEFT在非IID客户端异质性下脆弱，LoRA客户端学习子空间谱不对齐导致聚合方差高。
AI.method: TRISHUL使用共享冻结多头低秩基实现精确聚合，核范数近端收缩抑制客户端特定高秩谱分量，凹水填充规则非均匀分配适配头。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、SVHN、20 Newsgroups、MRQA、GLUE（LLaMA3.2-1B）上，TRISHUL收敛更快、更稳定、最终性能优于联邦LoRA基线，异质性越强增益越大。
AI.conclusion: 谱控制可有效提升联邦PEFT在异质性下的鲁棒性。
AI.problem: 联邦PEFT在非IID客户端异质性下性能退化，缺乏对更新子空间谱对齐的控制。
AI.key_results: 在CIFAR-100、SVHN、20 Newsgroups、MRQA、GLUE（LLaMA3.2-1B）上，TRISHUL收敛更快、更稳定、最终性能优于联邦LoRA基线，异质性越强增益越大。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：CIFAR-100、SVHN、20 Newsgroups、MRQA、GLUE，模型LLaMA3.2-1B；指标：收敛速度、稳定性、最终性能。

title: Controlled Periodic Synchronization for Efficient Data-Parallel Training
comment: 20 pages, 16 figures. Submitted for peer review
summary: Data-parallel training relies on frequent gradient synchronization across workers. Standard DDP synchronizes gradients at every iteration, which is effective on fast local-area networks but increasingly sensitive to communication latency and network variability in geographically distributed environments. Periodic methods such as LocalSGD reduce synchronization frequency but rely mainly on parameter averaging, which may be insufficient when worker trajectories diverge. This paper studies synchronization frequency as a systems parameter for communication-constrained distributed training. We evaluate Controlled Periodic Data Parallelism (CPDP), a PyTorch-DDP-compatible strategy that alternates local updates with a reconciliation step combining gradient AllReduce and SlowMo parameter averaging. Experiments are conducted on Grid'5000 across intra-site clusters and a cross-site WAN deployment spanning Nancy and Sophia with 16.6 ms RTT. In the main fixed learning-rate setting of 0.1 on ResNet-50/CIFAR-100, CPDP achieves the highest peak test accuracy among the evaluated configurations. At K=2, CPDP improves over DDP by 2.28 percentage points but incurs additional wall-clock time. At K=4, CPDP improves over DDP by 2.44 percentage points while reducing average wall-clock time by 13.8%. Direct profiling shows that exposed synchronization time at K=4 is roughly half that of DDP, explaining the improved WAN accuracy-time trade-off. Additional experiments on ViT-S/CIFAR-100 and ResNet-50/TinyImageNet show that CPDP remains competitive with DDP and generally improves over LocalSGD. Overall, the results show that synchronization frequency is a practical control parameter for distributed training under communication constraints.

AI.tldr: 研究同步频率作为通信受限分布式训练的系统参数，CPDP在WAN上提升精度并减少时间。
AI.motivation: 标准DDP在广域网中通信延迟高，LocalSGD在轨迹发散时精度不足，需要更灵活的同步策略。
AI.method: 硬件平台：Grid'5000集群（Intel节点，以太网互联）；关键技术：Controlled Periodic Data Parallelism (CPDP)，交替本地更新与梯度AllReduce+SlowMo参数平均的协调步骤；实现层级：系统（PyTorch-DDP兼容）。
AI.result: 在ResNet-50/CIFAR-100固定学习率0.1下，CPDP K=2比DDP精度高2.28个百分点但时间增加；K=4比DDP精度高2.44个百分点且平均时间减少13.8%；暴露同步时间约为DDP的一半。
AI.conclusion: 同步频率是通信约束下分布式训练的有效控制参数。
AI.problem: 现有DDP在广域网中通信开销大，LocalSGD在参数发散时精度下降，缺乏对同步频率的系统级调优。
AI.hardware: Grid'5000集群，节点间以太网，跨站点WAN部署（Nancy和Sophia，RTT 16.6 ms），具体GPU型号未明确。
AI.comm_mechanism: CPDP：交替本地更新与梯度AllReduce+SlowMo参数平均的协调步骤，控制同步频率K。
key_results: ResNet-50/CIFAR-100固定学习率0.1：CPDP K=2比DDP精度高2.28个百分点，但额外增加墙钟时间
CPDP K=4比DDP精度高2.44个百分点，平均墙钟时间减少13.8%
K=4时暴露同步时间约为DDP的一半
AI.baseline: 对比DDP和LocalSGD，测量口径为测试精度和墙钟时间。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：Grid'5000集群，ResNet-50/CIFAR-100，固定学习率0.1；指标：峰值测试精度、平均墙钟时间、暴露同步时间；重复次数未明确。
AI.value_7xthor: CPDP的同步频率控制思想可迁移到7×Jetson Thor的分布式推理中，用于优化通信与计算的平衡，但需适配推理场景（如梯度同步改为KV缓存同步或模型参数同步）。
AI.infra_assumption: 假设节点间以太网互联，存在通信延迟和带宽限制，但未明确具体带宽。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 成立。CPDP针对通信受限环境设计，无NVLink的以太网环境正是其适用场景。
AI.differentiation: 将CPDP的同步频率控制思想应用于分布式推理中的KV缓存同步或模型并行通信调度，探索在7×Thor上通过周期性同步减少通信开销。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主要针对训练场景，与推理（LLM serving）直接关联有限；虽涉及通信优化，但方法（梯度同步）不直接适用于推理的KV缓存或模型并行。

title: Adaptive Depth in Looped Transformers: Diagnosing Learned Halting Gates and Trajectory Readouts
summary: Looped Transformers increase test-time computation by repeatedly applying a shared recurrent block. Learned halting objectives in looped Transformers typically use a single exit distribution both as the inference-time stopping rule and as the training-time weighting of per-depth losses. This entangles exit selection with trajectory formation: the gate not only chooses which recurrent state to use, but also determines how strongly each intermediate state is supervised. Consequently, poor adaptive-compute performance can arise from the readout, the induced trajectory, or their interaction. We study adaptive depth in looped Transformers through this trajectory--readout lens, across controlled synthetic tasks (modular arithmetic and binary parity) and large-scale Ouro-1.4B and 2.6B checkpoints. We find that fixed-prior depth supervision, which shapes the trajectory without an input-dependent halting policy, produces difficulty-aware trajectories whose intermediate states expose useful stopping signals, and that simple post-hoc confidence readouts often match or outperform learned linear and MLP gates. Fitting gates on frozen trajectories localizes the failure: it appears to stem mainly from the trajectory induced by joint gate training rather than from limited gate expressivity. The same pattern is present in Ouro evaluations, where pretrained ponder gates are competitive but not uniformly Pareto-optimal, and measured latency confirms that the resulting reductions in average exit depth translate into practical inference-time savings. Our systematic diagnostic evaluation reframes adaptive depth in looped Transformers as a joint problem of trajectory formation and exit readout, rather than gate learning alone, highlighting a distinction that prior learned-halting work has often left implicit.

AI.tldr: 循环Transformer中自适应深度问题源于轨迹与读出纠缠，固定先验深度监督优于联合门控训练。
AI.motivation: 循环Transformer中学习到的暂停目标将退出选择与轨迹形成纠缠，导致自适应计算性能不佳。
AI.method: 通过轨迹-读出视角研究循环Transformer的自适应深度，在合成任务（模算术、二进制奇偶性）和大规模Ouro-1.4B/2.6B检查点上进行诊断评估。
AI.result: 固定先验深度监督产生难度感知轨迹，简单事后置信度读出匹配或超越学习门控；预训练门控在Ouro评估中具有竞争力但非均匀帕累托最优，平均退出深度减少带来实际推理时间节省。
AI.conclusion: 循环Transformer的自适应深度是轨迹形成和退出读出的联合问题，而非单纯的门控学习。
AI.problem: 循环Transformer中学习暂停目标将退出选择与轨迹形成纠缠，导致自适应计算性能不佳，且先前工作未明确区分。
AI.key_results:
1. 固定先验深度监督产生难度感知轨迹，中间状态暴露有用停止信号。
2. 简单事后置信度读出匹配或超越学习门控（线性/MLP）。
3. 预训练门控在Ouro评估中具有竞争力但非均匀帕累托最优。
4. 平均退出深度减少带来实际推理时间节省。
AI.baseline: 对比学习门控（线性/MLP）与固定先验深度监督、事后置信度读出。
AI.measurement: 合成任务（模算术、二进制奇偶性）和Ouro-1.4B/2.6B检查点；指标包括平均退出深度、推理延迟。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该论文主要关注循环Transformer的自适应深度机制，而非分布式推理或通信优化。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及分布式推理或互联约束。
AI.differentiation: 无直接差异化切入点，该论文属于模型架构层面，而非系统层面。
AI.deep_read_reason: 该论文属于模型架构研究，不涉及分布式推理、通信或容错，对7×Jetson Thor无直接可迁移价值。

title: A Graph Neural Network approach to zero-shot Digital Twins
summary: Traditional Predictive Digital Twins often remain geometrically rigid, requiring extensive retraining or fine-tuning whenever the underlying physical domain or boundary conditions change. To overcome this limitation, we present a novel framework for \textit{Zero-Shot Digital Twins} that seamlessly couples real-time visual perception with a geometry-agnostic, physics-informed reasoning engine. At the core of our architecture is the Thermodynamics-Informed Graph Neural Network architecture, a Geometric Deep Learning solver grounded in a metriplectic thermodynamic formalism that enforces energy conservation and non-negative entropy production locally through graph message passing. The framework integrates an auxiliary Graph Neural Network to infer unobservable fields (such as stress tensors or velocity and energy distributions) directly from sparse initial visual boundaries, mitigating numerical start-up transients. To bridge the sim-to-real gap, we implement a continuous closed-loop data assimilation mechanism; the pipeline tracks macroscopic deformations and free-surface fluid boundaries in real-time using deep segmentation networks combined with sparse optical flow, dynamically correcting the autoregressive simulation rollout and eliminating numerical drift. To test the validity of our approach, we demonstrate the extreme generalization capabilities of our approach across two disparate physical regimes: the large deformations of a viscoelastic beam and the non-linear sloshing of a viscous fluid. In both scenarios, the unified framework instantiates physically accurate simulations on novel, unseen geometries without case-specific retraining, operating well within real-time latency budgets (approximately 25 ms per frame) and enabling the direct projection of latent mechanical variables via Augmented Reality.

AI.tldr: 提出零样本数字孪生框架，结合视觉感知与热力学GNN，实现实时物理仿真。
AI.motivation: 传统数字孪生需针对几何变化重新训练，缺乏泛化能力。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；关键技术：热力学GNN、图消息传递、视觉感知（分割+光流）、数据同化；实现层级：系统。
AI.result: 在两种物理场景（粘弹性梁大变形、粘性流体非线性晃动）上实现零样本泛化，每帧延迟约25ms。
AI.conclusion: 提出的零样本数字孪生框架可泛化到未见几何，无需重新训练，且满足实时性。
AI.problem: 数字孪生对几何变化缺乏泛化能力，需大量重训练。
AI.key_results: 每帧延迟约25ms；在两种物理场景上实现零样本泛化。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：两种物理场景（粘弹性梁、粘性流体）；指标：每帧延迟约25ms。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该工作聚焦数字孪生与物理仿真，非分布式推理。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该工作不涉及分布式推理或通信。
AI.deep_read_reason: 该论文为数字孪生领域，与分布式推理无关，无系统级贡献。
